top3.sql:
WITH q1_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id,
        i_item_desc,
        s_state,
        ss_quantity
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    WHERE d1.d_quarter_name = '2001Q1'
),
q1_returns AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id,
        i_item_desc,
        s_state,
        sr_return_quantity
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN store ON sr_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item...

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state,
    COUNT(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_count,
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(ss_quantity, ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_cov,
    COUNT(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_count,
    AVG(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(sr_return_quantity, sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_cov...

WITH q1_data AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_id,
        i_item_desc,
        s_state,
        'ss' AS src,
        ss_quantity AS quantity
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk

    WHERE d1.d_quarter_name = '2001Q1'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        i_item_id,
        i_item_desc,
        s_state,
        'sr' AS src,
        sr_return_quantity AS quantity
